title: Accept or decline tasks on Monday?
excerpt: Is it possible to add people to different tasks so that they need to accept or decline the task and I would get a notification of their response?

posts.author: caro (Carolina Mobarac)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add people to different tasks so that they need to accept or decline the task and I would get a notification of their response?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @caro

You might want to check out this app 40|Status Controlled Groups - Excellent Team

Let me know if this solves your requirement

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @caro, have you thought about using a status column for this? “Accept” and “decline” could be status labels, which would then trigger a notification to you via this automation:

The automation would read something like, “When status changes to ‘Accept’, notify Caro”. You can click on the word “notify” to write the specific message for that status

posts.author: caro (Carolina Mobarac)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! I thought about it at first, but how would it work with 3-5 people invited to the same task?
